languages.text: "Сие... cокрыто от нас за пологом тайн. Мы все перепробовали — но с тех пор, как стали поедать себе подобных, лишь человеческая плоть утоляет наш голод".

traits.locale_text: "Сие... cокрыто от нас за пологом тайн. Мы все перепробовали — но с тех пор, как стали поедать себе подобных, лишь человеческая плоть утоляет наш голод".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Сие... cокрыто от нас за пологом тайн. Мы все перепробовали — но с тех пор, как стали поедать себе подобных, лишь человеческая плоть утоляет наш голод".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "The... The answer remains shrouded in mystery. We tried everything — but since we started feasting upon our own kind, nothing but human flesh satiates our hunger."
languages.original_text: "Сие... cокрыто от нас за пологом тайн. Мы все перепробовали — но с тех пор, как стали поедать себе подобных, лишь человеческая плоть утоляет наш голод".

traits.locale_text: "The... The answer remains shrouded in mystery. We tried everything — but since we started feasting upon our own kind, nothing but human flesh satiates our hunger."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "The... The answer remains shrouded in mystery. We tried everything — but since we started feasting upon our own kind, nothing but human flesh satiates our hunger."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "The... The answer remains shrouded in mystery. We tried everything — but since we started feasting upon our own kind, nothing but human flesh satiates our hunger."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Die... Die Antwort bleibt ein Geheimnis. Wir haben alles versucht — aber seit wir uns an unserer eigenen Art laben, stillt nichts als Menschenfleisch unseren Hunger."
languages.original_text: "The... The answer remains shrouded in mystery. We tried everything — but since we started feasting upon our own kind, nothing but human flesh satiates our hunger."

languages.text: "La... La réponse reste entourée de mystère. Nous avons tout essayé, mais depuis que nous avons commencé à nous régaler de notre propre espèce, rien d'autre que la chair humaine ne rassasie notre faim."
languages.original_text: "The... The answer remains shrouded in mystery. We tried everything — but since we started feasting upon our own kind, nothing but human flesh satiates our hunger."

languages.text: "那...答案仍然是个谜我们什么都试过了，但自从我们开始大吃同类后 除了人肉，什么都满足不了我们的饥饿。"
languages.original_text: "The... The answer remains shrouded in mystery. We tried everything — but since we started feasting upon our own kind, nothing but human flesh satiates our hunger."

languages.text: "La... La respuesta sigue siendo un misterio. Lo hemos intentado todo, pero desde que empezamos a darnos festines con los de nuestra especie, sólo la carne humana sacia nuestra hambre."
languages.original_text: "The... The answer remains shrouded in mystery. We tried everything — but since we started feasting upon our own kind, nothing but human flesh satiates our hunger."

languages.text: "その...答えは謎に包まれたままだ。あらゆることを試したが...同族を食べるようになってから、人肉以外では空腹を満たせなくなった。"
languages.original_text: "The... The answer remains shrouded in mystery. We tried everything — but since we started feasting upon our own kind, nothing but human flesh satiates our hunger."

languages.text: "Bu... Cevap hala gizemini koruyor. Her şeyi denedik — ama kendi türümüzle ziyafet çekmeye başladığımızdan beri, insan etinden başka hiçbir şey açlığımızı doyurmuyor."
languages.original_text: "The... The answer remains shrouded in mystery. We tried everything — but since we started feasting upon our own kind, nothing but human flesh satiates our hunger."
